credentials.ACME_DNS_STORAGE_BASE_URL: The ACME-DNS JSON account data server.
credentials.ACME_DNS_STORAGE_PATH: The ACME-DNS JSON account data file. A per-domain account will be registered/persisted to this file and used for TXT updates.

additional_configuration.ACME_DNS_ALLOWLIST: Source networks using CIDR notation (multiple values should be separated with a comma).

additional_configuration.ACTIVE24_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
additional_configuration.ACTIVE24_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60)
additional_configuration.ACTIVE24_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 120)

additional_configuration.ALICLOUD_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
additional_configuration.ALICLOUD_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60)
additional_configuration.ALICLOUD_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 600)

additional_configuration.ALL_INKL_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
additional_configuration.ALL_INKL_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60)

additional_configuration.ARVANCLOUD_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
additional_configuration.ARVANCLOUD_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 120)
additional_configuration.ARVANCLOUD_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 600)

credentials.AURORA_API_KEY: API key or username to used

additional_configuration.AURORA_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
additional_configuration.AURORA_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60)
additional_configuration.AURORA_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 300)

additional_configuration.AUTODNS_CONTEXT: API context (4 for production, 1 for testing. Defaults to 4)
additional_configuration.AUTODNS_ENDPOINT: API endpoint URL, defaults to https://api.autodns.com/v1/
additional_configuration.AUTODNS_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
additional_configuration.AUTODNS_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 120)
additional_configuration.AUTODNS_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 600)

additional_configuration.AXELNAME_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
additional_configuration.AXELNAME_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60)
additional_configuration.AXELNAME_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 120)

credentials.AZURE_ENVIRONMENT: Azure environment, one of: public, usgovernment, german, and china

additional_configuration.AZURE_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
additional_configuration.AZURE_PRIVATE_ZONE: Set to true to use Azure Private DNS Zones and not public
additional_configuration.AZURE_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 120)
additional_configuration.AZURE_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 60)
additional_configuration.AZURE_ZONE_NAME: Zone name to use inside Azure DNS service to add the TXT record in

additional_configuration.AZURE_AUTH_METHOD: Specify which authentication method to use

additional_configuration.AZURE_ZONE_NAME: Zone name to use inside Azure DNS service to add the TXT record in

additional_configuration.BAIDUCLOUD_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 120)

credentials.RFC2136_NAMESERVER: Network address in the form host or host:port
credentials.RFC2136_TSIG_ALGORITHM: TSIG algorithm. See [miekg/dns#tsig.go](https://github.com/miekg/dns/blob/master/tsig.go) for supported values. To disable TSIG authentication, leave the 'RFC2136_TSIG_KEY' or 'RFC2136_TSIG_SECRET' variables unset.
credentials.RFC2136_TSIG_KEY: Name of the secret key as defined in DNS server configuration. To disable TSIG authentication, leave the 'RFC2136_TSIG_KEY' variable unset.
credentials.RFC2136_TSIG_SECRET: Secret key payload. To disable TSIG authentication, leave the 'RFC2136_TSIG_SECRET' variable unset.

additional_configuration.RFC2136_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
additional_configuration.RFC2136_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60)
additional_configuration.RFC2136_SEQUENCE_INTERVAL: Time between sequential requests in seconds (Default: 60)
additional_configuration.RFC2136_TSIG_FILE: Path to a key file generated by tsig-keygen
additional_configuration.RFC2136_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 120)

additional_configuration.RIMUHOSTING_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
additional_configuration.RIMUHOSTING_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60)
additional_configuration.RIMUHOSTING_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 3600)

credentials.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID: Managed by the AWS client. Access key ID ('AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID_FILE' is not supported, use 'AWS_SHARED_CREDENTIALS_FILE' instead)
credentials.AWS_ASSUME_ROLE_ARN: Managed by the AWS Role ARN ('AWS_ASSUME_ROLE_ARN_FILE' is not supported)
credentials.AWS_EXTERNAL_ID: Managed by STS AssumeRole API operation ('AWS_EXTERNAL_ID_FILE' is not supported)
credentials.AWS_PROFILE: Managed by the AWS client ('AWS_PROFILE_FILE' is not supported)
credentials.AWS_REGION: Managed by the AWS client ('AWS_REGION_FILE' is not supported)
credentials.AWS_SDK_LOAD_CONFIG: Managed by the AWS client. Retrieve the region from the CLI config file ('AWS_SDK_LOAD_CONFIG_FILE' is not supported)
credentials.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: Managed by the AWS client. Secret access key ('AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY_FILE' is not supported, use 'AWS_SHARED_CREDENTIALS_FILE' instead)
credentials.AWS_WAIT_FOR_RECORD_SETS_CHANGED: Wait for changes to be INSYNC (it can be unstable)

additional_configuration.WEBSUPPORT_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60)
additional_configuration.WEBSUPPORT_SEQUENCE_INTERVAL: Time between sequential requests in seconds (Default: 60)
additional_configuration.WEBSUPPORT_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 600)

credentials.WEDOS_USERNAME: Username is the same as for the admin account
credentials.WEDOS_WAPI_PASSWORD: Password needs to be generated and IP allowed in the admin interface

additional_configuration.WEDOS_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 10)
additional_configuration.WEDOS_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 600)
additional_configuration.WEDOS_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 300)

additional_configuration.WESTCN_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 10)
additional_configuration.WESTCN_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 120)
additional_configuration.WESTCN_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 60)

additional_configuration.YANDEX_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
additional_configuration.YANDEX_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60)
additional_configuration.YANDEX_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 21600)

additional_configuration.YANDEX360_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
additional_configuration.YANDEX360_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60)
additional_configuration.YANDEX360_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 21600)

credentials.YANDEX_CLOUD_FOLDER_ID: The string id of folder (aka project) in Yandex Cloud
credentials.YANDEX_CLOUD_IAM_TOKEN: The base64 encoded json which contains information about iam token of service account with 'dns.admin' permissions

additional_configuration.YANDEX_CLOUD_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
additional_configuration.YANDEX_CLOUD_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60)
additional_configuration.YANDEX_CLOUD_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 60)

additional_configuration.ZONEEE_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 5)
additional_configuration.ZONEEE_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 300)

additional_configuration.ZONOMI_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
additional_configuration.ZONOMI_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60)
additional_configuration.ZONOMI_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 3600)
